title: Missed rewrite to bulk operators in simple SQL UDF
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(d DATE, value DECIMAL);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY, 2.5);
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION test(d1 DATE, d2 DATE) RETURNS DECIMAL AS $$ BEGIN RETURN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d1 - d2)) * 1000;
key_bug_features: Returning multiplied value from SQL UDF triggers MAL loop
